hero.description: Thank you for your interest in MeriGauMata and our mission to uplift and shelter cows. We value your thoughts, questions, and feedback. Please don't hesitate to reach out to us. Our dedicated team is here to assist you.

form.title: Get in Touch
form.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you!
form.errorMinWords: Please enter at least 50 words. Current word count: {count}
form.errorMaxWords: Please keep your message under 100 words. Current word count: {count}

validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.phoneMin: Phone number must be at least 10 digits.
validation.subjectMin: Subject must be at least 3 characters.

volunteerCard.title: Volunteer Opportunities
volunteerCard.description: Interested in becoming a volunteer and making a hands-on difference? Please visit our Volunteer page for more information and to fill out an application.

donationCard.title: Donation Information
donationCard.description: To make a donation or learn more about our various giving options, visit our Donation page. Every contribution helps sustain our sanctuary.

donateCTA.title: Donate Now and Help Level Up the Lives of Cows in Need
donateCTA.description: Your donation will help provide essential services to cows in need, such as food, healthcare, shelter, and compassion.
donateCTA.prompt: Click here to donate now and save lives.

faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.description: Find answers to common questions about our sanctuary, visits, and donations. If you need further assistance, don't hesitate to reach out.
